# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: my-compute-engine
    type: compute.v1.instance
    properties:
      machineType: n1-standard-4
      zone: us-central1-a
      disks:
        - boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            image: ubuntu-2204-lts
  - name: my-cloud-sql
    type: sql.v1.databaseInstance
    properties:
      name: my-sql-db
      region: us-central1
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_8
  - name: my-cloud-storage
    type: storage.v1.bucket
    properties:
      name: my-storage-bucket
  - name: my-load-balancer
    type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
    properties:
      target: my-compute-engine
      portRange: 80
      loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
